config.label: Bot Token
config.help: Slack app → OAuth & Permissions → Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-…). Scopes: channels:history, groups:history, chat:write. Invite the bot into each channel.

config.label: Channel IDs
config.help: comma-separated channel IDs (e.g. C0123ABCD) — open the channel → details → copy the ID at the bottom
